title: Plush Polymer
description: Ce style incarne l'esthétique moderne des startups technologiques à travers un rendu 3D hautement poli et stylisé. Il se caractérise par des surfaces lisses et tactiles rappelant les jouets en vinyle de créateurs, utilisant une illumination globale douce, une diffusion sous-surfacique subtile et des formes géométriques minimalistes pour créer une atmosphère accessible, épurée et conviviale.
description_en: This style embodies the modern tech-startup aesthetic through highly polished, stylized 3D rendering. It features smooth, tactile surfaces reminiscent of designer vinyl toys, utilizing soft global illumination, subtle subsurface scattering, and minimalist geometric shapes to create an approachable, clean, and friendly atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style incarne l'esthétique moderne des startups technologiques à travers un rendu 3D hautement poli et stylisé. Il se caractérise par des surfaces lisses et tactiles rappelant les jouets en vinyle de créateurs, utilisant une illumination globale douce, une diffusion sous-surfacique subtile et des formes géométriques minimalistes pour créer une atmosphère accessible, épurée et conviviale.
prompt: High-fidelity stylized 3D rendering, reminiscent of modern tech startup illustrations and premium designer vinyl toys. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The composition must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space, ensuring a full bleed to all four corners with no borders, frames, or canvas margins. The visual execution relies on smooth, minimalist geometry featuring chamfered edges and rounded forms, possessing a soft, tactile quality akin to matte plastic, polymer, or sculpted clay. Illumination is driven by a professional 3D studio lighting setup: soft global illumination, a broad diffused overhead key light, gentle ambient fill, and subtle rim lighting to separate volumes. This creates ultra-smooth, diffuse gradients, deep but soft ambient occlusion, and grounded contact shadows. Materiality is defined by stylized physically based rendering; organic forms exhibit gentle subsurface scattering, while structural elements feature micro-textures like subtle fabric weaves or fine matte bumps against otherwise pristine, sweeping curves. The color science integrates {{primary_color}} as the dominant base, punctuated by {{accent_color}} for striking focal points, and harmonized with {{secondary_color}} for structural balance, maintaining a warm, high-key, and inviting palette. Edges are razor-sharp, perfectly anti-aliased 3D silhouettes devoid of any stroke or linework. The atmosphere is approachable, impeccably clean, and contemporary. stylized 3D render, corporate memphis 3D, vinyl toy aesthetic, soft global illumination, subsurface scattering, matte materials, ambient occlusion, clean topology, smooth gradients, high-key studio lighting, physically based rendering, minimalist geometry, approachable atmosphere, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: High-fidelity stylized 3D rendering, reminiscent of modern tech startup illustrations and premium designer vinyl toys. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The entire scene is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame. The visual execution relies on smooth, minimalist geometry featuring chamfered edges and rounded forms, possessing a soft, tactile quality akin to matte plastic, polymer, or sculpted clay. Illumination is driven by a professional 3D studio lighting setup: soft global illumination, a broad diffused overhead key light, gentle ambient fill, and subtle rim lighting to separate volumes. This creates ultra-smooth, diffuse gradients, deep but soft ambient occlusion, and grounded contact shadows cast directly onto the {{background_color}} backdrop. Materiality is defined by stylized physically based rendering; organic forms exhibit gentle subsurface scattering, while structural elements feature micro-textures like subtle fabric weaves or fine matte bumps against otherwise pristine, sweeping curves. The color science integrates {{primary_color}} as the dominant base, punctuated by {{accent_color}} for striking focal points, and harmonized with {{secondary_color}} for structural balance, maintaining a warm, high-key, and inviting palette. Edges are razor-sharp, perfectly anti-aliased 3D silhouettes flawlessly interacting with the {{background_color}} devoid of any stroke or linework. The atmosphere is approachable, impeccably clean, and contemporary. stylized 3D render, corporate memphis 3D, vinyl toy aesthetic, soft global illumination, subsurface scattering, matte materials, ambient occlusion, clean topology, smooth gradients, high-key studio lighting, physically based rendering, minimalist geometry, approachable atmosphere
background_prompt: A pristine, stylized 3D environment matching a modern tech illustration aesthetic. The scene features smooth, minimalist geometric shapes and soft, sweeping architectural forms rendered with matte polymer textures. Soft global illumination and a diffused studio lighting setup create gentle gradients and deep ambient occlusion. The environment utilizes {{primary_color}} as the foundational hue, with architectural accents in {{accent_color}} and supporting structural elements in {{secondary_color}}. The atmosphere is clean, modern, and inviting, devoid of any specific subjects or foreground elements, serving perfectly as a high-fidelity 3D backdrop.
background_prompt_removebg: A pristine, stylized 3D environment matching a modern tech illustration aesthetic. The scene features smooth, minimalist geometric shapes and soft, sweeping architectural forms rendered with matte polymer textures. Soft global illumination and a diffused studio lighting setup create gentle gradients and deep ambient occlusion. The environment utilizes {{primary_color}} as the foundational hue, with architectural accents in {{accent_color}} and supporting structural elements in {{secondary_color}}. The atmosphere is clean, modern, and inviting, devoid of any specific subjects. In the foreground, an elegant arrangement of floating, soft-edged 3D geometric primitives and subtle matte ribbons frames the invisible subject, creating a sense of volumetric depth. This entire environmental arrangement and the floating foreground frames are rendered against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop, with soft, diffuse ambient shadows cast onto the {{background_color}} surface to perfectly anchor the 3D elements.
